steps.title: Test the point
steps.content: Substitute the point $(6,0)$ into the first inequality: $$0\le 6+12$$ This is true because $0\le 18$.

steps.title: Check the other condition
steps.content: Substitute the same point into the second inequality: $$0\ge -3(6)-12$$ This is true because $0\ge -30$, so the point satisfies both inequalities. The answer is D.
